_publications._publicationTitle: Establishment of immortalized murine mesothelial cells and a novel mesothelioma cell line.

_contextSnippet: These cells, named RN5, have a similar morphology like AK7 cells in vitro, i.e., both cell lines show an epithelioid morphology, nearly as cobblestone-like as primary mesothelial cells
details: AK7 cells show epithelioid morphology, similar to RN5 cells
